creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I guess you're using GH_TAGNAME because the tag on GitHub is prefixed with 'postfixamin-'.

In this case, you can write like:

DISTVERSIONPREFIX= postfixadmin-
DISTVERSION= 3.2.4

and no GH_TAGNAME is required. (I think this is easier for maintaining.)

Can you update the patch accordingly?
